sentences.target: Er ist seit Wochen auf der Flucht.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ɪst zaɪ̯t ˈvɔxn̩ aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ flʊχt/

translations.de: Er ist seit Wochen auf der Flucht.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ɪst zaɪ̯t ˈvɔxn̩ aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ flʊχt/
translations.en: He has been on the run for weeks.
translations.fr: Il est en cavale depuis des semaines.
translations.ko: 그는 몇 주째 도망 다니고 있다.
translations.yue: 佢已經逃亡咗幾個星期喇。
translations.ru: Он уже несколько недель в бегах.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đã lẩn trốn suốt nhiều tuần.
translations.nl: Hij is al weken op de vlucht.
translations.uk: Він уже кілька тижнів у бігах.
translations.nb: Han har vært på flukt i flere uker.
translations.sv: Han har varit på flykt i veckor.
translations.ro: Este în fugă de săptămâni întregi.
translations.da: Han har været på flugt i ugevis.
translations.ja: 彼は何週間も逃亡中だ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative singular masculine; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary; present indicative 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate prepositional phrase expressing state.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP ('seit Wochen').
Common noun; dative plural as object of 'seit'; temporal duration.
Preposition governing dative (static state); introduces PP ('auf der Flucht') functioning as predicative complement.
Definite article; dative singular feminine; determiner agreeing with 'Flucht' in the PP.
Common noun; dative singular feminine; head of the PP 'auf der Flucht' (idiomatic: 'on the run').

sentences.target: Ich denke oft an ihre Flucht.

translations.de: Ich denke oft an ihre Flucht.
translations.en: I often think about her escape.
translations.fr: Je pense souvent à sa fuite.
translations.ru: Я часто думаю о её побеге.
translations.vi: Tôi thường nghĩ về lần cô ấy bỏ trốn.
translations.ar: أنا كثيرًا ما أفكر في هروبها.
translations.nl: Ik denk vaak aan haar ontsnapping.
translations.uk: Я часто думаю про її втечу.
translations.hi: मैं अक्सर उसके भागने के बारे में सोचता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg tenker ofte på flukten hennes.
translations.sv: Jag tänker ofta på hennes flykt.
translations.ro: Mă gândesc des la fuga ei.
translations.da: Jeg tænker ofte på hendes flugt.
translations.ja: 彼女の逃亡のことをよく考える。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative singular first person; subject of the clause.
Main verb; present indicative 1st person singular; selects a prepositional complement with 'an' + accusative.
Adverb of frequency; modifies 'denke'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces PP complement of 'denken'.
Possessive determiner; feminine singular accusative (modifies 'Flucht'); person 3; marks possession (here: 'her').
Common noun; accusative singular feminine; object of the preposition 'an' (PP complement of 'denken').

sentences.target: Die Flucht gelang ihm in letzter Minute.
sentences.reading: /diː flʊχt gəˈlaŋ iːm ɪn ˈlɛtstɐ miˈnuːtə/

translations.de: Die Flucht gelang ihm in letzter Minute.
translations.ipa: /diː flʊχt gəˈlaŋ iːm ɪn ˈlɛtstɐ miˈnuːtə/
translations.en: The escape worked out at the last minute.
translations.es: Logró escapar en el último momento.
translations.fr: Il a réussi à s'échapper à la dernière minute.
translations.it: È riuscito a scappare all'ultimo minuto.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在最后一刻成功逃脱了。
translations.yue: 佢喺最後一刻成功走甩。
translations.ru: Ему удалось сбежать в последнюю минуту.
translations.pt: Ele conseguiu escapar no último minuto.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đã kịp trốn thoát vào phút chót.
translations.ar: تمكّن من الهرب في اللحظة الأخيرة.
translations.nl: Hij wist op het laatste moment te ontsnappen.
translations.uk: Йому вдалося втекти в останню мить.
translations.hi: आखिरी क्षण में वह भाग निकलने में सफल रहा.
translations.pl: Udało mu się uciec w ostatniej chwili.
translations.el: Κατάφερε να δραπετεύσει την τελευταία στιγμή.
translations.nb: Han klarte å rømme i siste liten.
translations.id: Dia berhasil melarikan diri pada detik-detik terakhir.
translations.sv: Han lyckades fly i sista stund.
translations.ro: A reușit să fugă în ultima clipă.
translations.cs: Na poslední chvíli se mu podařilo utéct.
translations.da: Det lykkedes ham at flygte i sidste øjeblik.

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine; determiner of 'Flucht'.
Common noun; nominative singular feminine; subject of 'gelang'.
Intransitive verb; preterite (simple past) 3rd person singular; takes a dative experiencer ('ihm').
Personal pronoun; dative singular masculine; indirect object/experiencer of 'gelang'.
Preposition; here with dative (temporal, static); introduces the temporal PP.
Attributive adjective; dative singular feminine (strong inflection, no article); modifies 'Minute' in the PP.
Common noun; dative singular feminine; head of the temporal PP 'in letzter Minute'.

sentences.target: Sie half ihm bei der Flucht.

translations.de: Sie half ihm bei der Flucht.
translations.it: Lei lo ha aiutato a scappare.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đã giúp anh ấy trốn thoát.
translations.hi: उसने उसे भागने में मदद की.
translations.nb: Hun hjalp ham med å rømme.
translations.da: Hun hjalp ham med at flygte.
translations.ja: 彼女は彼が逃げるのを手伝った。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative singular third person; subject of the clause.
Main verb; preterite (simple past) 3rd person singular; ditransitive, selecting a dative recipient ('ihm') and a PP with 'bei' + dative.
Personal pronoun; dative singular masculine; recipient/indirect object of 'half'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces PP indicating the context/occasion of assistance.
Definite article; dative singular feminine; determiner of 'Flucht' within the PP.
Common noun; dative singular feminine; object within the PP 'bei der Flucht'.

Die Flucht gelang ihm in letzter Minute.
Sie half ihm bei der Flucht.
